zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida von Süpplingenburg於大約1072年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 爾姆斯泰特素普林根波格時，她的父親Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg34歲，母親Hedwig von Formbach24歲。她和Sieghard IX von Tengling至少有1個兒子。她去世於1138年3月3日在她的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida von Süpplingenburg于大约1072年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 爾姆斯泰特素普林根波格时，她的父亲Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg34岁，母亲Hedwig von Formbach24岁。她和Sieghard IX von Tengling至少有1个儿子。她去世于1138年3月3日在她的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida von Süpplingenburg was born about 1072, in Süpplingenburg, Helmstedt, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, was 34 and her mother, Hedwig von Formbach, was 24. She had at least 1 son with Sieghard IX von Tengling. She died on 3 March 1138, in her hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida von Süpplingenburg est née environ 1072, à Süpplingenburg, Landkreis Helmstedt, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Formbach, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sieghard IX von Tengling. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1138, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida von Süpplingenburg um 1072 in Süpplingenburg, Landkreis Helmstedt, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg 34 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Formbach 24. Sie hatte mit Sieghard IX von Tengling mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 3. März 1138 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Süpplingenburg è nata il circa 1072 nel Süpplingenburg, Landkreis Helmstedt, Niedersachsen, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Formbach, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sieghard IX von Tengling. Morì il 3 marzo 1138, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida von Süpplingenburgが約1072年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ヘルムステトスuップリンジェンブルグで生まれた時，父Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburgは34歳，母Hedwig von Formbachは24歳であった。彼女はSieghard IX von Tenglingとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1138年3月3日に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida von Süpplingenburg(이)가 대략 1072년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 헬스테드트 스u플링버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Formbach(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Sieghard IX von Tengling(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1138년 3월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Süpplingenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1072, em Süpplingenburg, Landkreis Helmstedt, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Formbach, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sieghard IX von Tengling. Ela faleceu em 3 de março de 1138, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida von Süpplingenburg родилась около 1072 г. в местности сuпплингенбург, ландкрис хелмстедт, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Formbach, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sieghard IX von Tengling. Она умерла 3 марта 1138 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida von Süpplingenburg nació aproximadamente 1072, en Süpplingenburg, Landkreis Helmstedt, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Formbach, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sieghard IX von Tengling. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1138, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
